title: Neural Network Optimization
abstract: This invention relates to optimizing neural network training using adaptive gradient techniques and distributed computation.

title: Battery Management System
abstract: A system for monitoring lithium ion battery health, temperature regulation, and charge balancing in electric vehicles.

title: Medical Imaging Analysis
abstract: Methods for automated tumor detection in MRI scans using convolutional neural networks and image segmentation.

title: Autonomous Navigation
abstract: A navigation framework for autonomous mobile robots using sensor fusion and probabilistic path planning.

title: Natural Language Processing
abstract: Techniques for multilingual text classification and semantic similarity detection using transformer architectures.
